old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-mugl.3","title":"All impls: Gateway coordination","description":"Implement gateway coordination in all codebases.

## Gateway-side (Python/Rust, runs on RPi or server)

1. Backbone networking (UDP/CoAP over WiFi/Ethernet)
2. Gateway discovery (multicast probe)
3. Slot negotiation state machine
4. Node registry with handoff support
5. OSCORE for closed federation / signatures for open

## Node-side (Zephyr, optional awareness)

1. Detect multiple gateways (multiple DIOs)
2. Prefer closest/strongest gateway
3. Handoff: send DAO to new gateway when signal improves
4. Honor slot assignment from current gateway

## Configuration

### Closed federation
- PSK configured on all gateways
- Single CONFIG_LICHEN_GW_PSK value

### Open federation
- Gateway uses node identity (Ed25519)
- Trust store for known gateways (TOFU or pinned)

## Kconfig (Zephyr gateway builds)
- CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_COORDINATION=y
- CONFIG_LICHEN_GW_FEDERATION_MODE=closed|open
- CONFIG_LICHEN_GW_PSK (for closed mode)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:34:53.028619Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:34:53.028619Z","labels":["python","rust","zephyr","gateway","implementation","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-mugl.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-mugl","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:34:53.17498Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-mugl.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-mugl.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:34:53.284131Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value:
{"notes":"## Requirement: Both Federation Modes

Implementation MUST support both modes, not one or the other.

### Mode detection
- Incoming coordination from PSK peer → use OSCORE
- Incoming coordination from signature peer → verify Ed25519
- Gateway responds in same mode as request

### Dual-mode operation
Gateway can be configured with:
- PSK for known/trusted peers (closed)
- Ed25519 identity for discovery (open)
- Both active simultaneously

### Configuration examples

Closed only:
  federation_mode: closed
  psk: <base64-secret>

Open only:
  federation_mode: open
  # Uses node's Ed25519 identity

Dual mode:
  federation_mode: dual
  psk: <base64-secret>  # For closed peers
  # Ed25519 for open peers

### Test coverage
- Closed-to-closed coordination
- Open-to-open coordination  
- Dual-mode gateway coordinating with both
- Mode mismatch handling (graceful rejection)"}
